title: CBB Rulebook Volume 5 Open Banking eKYC and Consent Requirements
summary: Requires authorised open banking providers to obtain customer consent and access account data through regulated digital interfaces, supporting trusted digital identity and authorisation flows in finance.

theme_notes.digital_government.digital_identity_trus: Financial-sector identity, consent and account-access controls for open banking.

notes: Related instruments: Related to Bahrain Open Banking Framework and CBB Open Banking modules
